mapper.sql: id, title, subtitle, major_id, course_id, is_final_exam, status, recommended, difficulty, duration, total_score, pass_score, introduction, notes, examiner, logo, question_range_type, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM edu_exam WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO edu_exam (title, subtitle, major_id, course_id, is_final_exam, status, recommended, difficulty, duration, total_score, pass_score, introduction, notes, examiner, logo, question_range_type, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by) VALUES (#{title}, #{subtitle}, #{majorId}, #{courseId}, #{isFinalExam}, #{status}, #{recommended}, #{difficulty}, #{duration}, #{totalScore}, #{passScore}, #{introduction}, #{notes}, #{examiner}, #{logo}, #{questionRangeType}, NOW(), NOW(), #{createBy}, #{updateBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE edu_exam SET title = #{title}, subtitle = #{subtitle}, major_id = #{majorId}, course_id = #{courseId}, is_final_exam = #{isFinalExam}, status = #{status}, recommended = #{recommended}, difficulty = #{difficulty}, duration = #{duration}, total_score = #{totalScore}, pass_score = #{passScore}, introduction = #{introduction}, notes = #{notes}, examiner = #{examiner}, logo = #{logo}, question_range_type = #{questionRangeType}, update_time = NOW(), update_by = #{updateBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE edu_exam SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE edu_exam SET deleted = 0 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM edu_exam WHERE deleted = 1 ORDER BY update_time DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM edu_exam WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 1
mapper.select: SELECT FROM edu_exam WHERE title = #{title} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE edu_exam SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
